PREMISES:
forall x (zumpus(x) -> aggressive(x))
forall x (zumpus(x) -> yumpus(x))
forall x (wumpus(x) -> not_small(x))
forall x (yumpus(x) -> not_luminous(x))

forall x (numpus(x) -> rompus(x))

forall x (vumpus(x) -> bright(x))
forall x (vumpus(x) -> dumpus(x))
forall x (dumpus(x) -> small(x))
forall x (dumpus(x) -> tumpus(x))
forall x (tumpus(x) -> cold(x))

CONCLUSION:
